title: Add Naming Conventions checkstyle checks with 100% coverage
description:
Implement the 9 naming convention checks used by Aeron/Agrona/Artio:

## Checks to Implement
- ConstantName
- LocalFinalVariableName  
- LocalVariableName
- MemberName
- MethodName
- PackageName
- ParameterName
- StaticVariableName
- TypeName

## Approach
1. Use dump_java_ast tool to understand AST structure for each naming element
2. Build tests using checkstyle's own test cases as fixtures
3. For each naming convention, create tests that measure:
   - What violations are correctly detected
   - What violations are missed (false negatives)
   - What erroneous findings occur (false positives)
4. Create an overall summary test to track progress toward 100% compatibility

## Validation
Once 100% compatibility achieved:
- Validate against Agrona repo (should be clean)
- Validate against Aeron repo (should be clean)
- Validate against Artio repo (should be clean)

All three repos use these naming checks and have no checkstyle errors.
